criteria.name: Chooses a process-oriented diagram
criteria.description: Uses a Mermaid flowchart or equivalent process diagram rather than a sequence, class, or ER diagram.

criteria.name: Represents the requested branch
criteria.description: Includes the clarifying-question path for unclear bug reports.

criteria.name: Covers the full lifecycle
criteria.description: Includes triage, reproduction, fix, review, and release notes or release documentation.

criteria.name: Explains the type choice briefly
criteria.description: Includes one concise sentence explaining why the chosen diagram type fits the request.
